control.description-key: Generic multi-table lookup backed by a Dataverse junction table

property.name: value
property.description-key: Bound text field used to preserve selections before the parent record is first saved

property.name: junctionTableName
property.description-key: Logical name of the junction table

property.name: junctionPrimaryIdColumn
property.description-key: Logical name of the junction table primary ID column

property.name: junctionNameColumn
property.description-key: Optional text column in the junction table used to cache the selected record name

property.name: junctionTypeColumn
property.description-key: Optional choice or number column used to identify the selected target table

property.name: junctionRoleColumn
property.description-key: Optional choice or number column used to isolate several lookup roles

property.name: junctionRoleValue
property.description-key: Optional numeric role value

property.name: parentTableName
property.description-key: Logical name of the table hosting the control

property.name: parentEntitySetName
property.description-key: Entity set name used by OData for the parent table

property.name: parentLookupColumn
property.description-key: Dataverse Web API navigation property of the parent lookup in the junction table; this is usually the lookup logical name but must match metadata exactly

property.name: target1TableName
property.description-key: Logical name of the first selectable table

property.name: target1EntitySetName
property.description-key: Entity set name used by OData for the first table

property.name: target1PrimaryIdColumn
property.description-key: Logical name of the first table primary ID column

property.name: target1PrimaryNameColumn
property.description-key: Logical name of the first table search and display column

property.name: target1LookupColumn
property.description-key: Dataverse Web API navigation property of the first target lookup in the junction table; this is usually the lookup logical name but must match metadata exactly

property.name: target1DisplayLabel
property.description-key: Optional user-facing label

property.name: target1Icon
property.description-key: Optional icon: person, building or generic

property.name: target1AllowCreate
property.description-key: Allow quick creation for the first table

property.name: target1TypeValue
property.description-key: Optional numeric value written to the junction type column

property.name: target2TableName
property.description-key: Logical name of the second selectable table

property.name: target2EntitySetName
property.description-key: Entity set name used by OData for the second table

property.name: target2PrimaryIdColumn
property.description-key: Logical name of the second table primary ID column

property.name: target2PrimaryNameColumn
property.description-key: Logical name of the second table search and display column

property.name: target2LookupColumn
property.description-key: Dataverse Web API navigation property of the second target lookup in the junction table; this is usually the lookup logical name but must match metadata exactly

property.name: target2DisplayLabel
property.description-key: Optional user-facing label

property.name: target2Icon
property.description-key: Optional icon: person, building or generic

property.name: target2AllowCreate
property.description-key: Allow quick creation for the second table

property.name: target2TypeValue
property.description-key: Optional numeric value written to the junction type column

property.name: minimumSearchLength
property.description-key: Minimum number of characters before searching

property.name: placeholder
property.description-key: Optional input placeholder
